display_text: Clockwerk Aghanim's Scepter: Overclocking — Supercharges all of Clockwerk's abilities, enhancing Battery Assault's AoE control, Power Cogs' attack speed, Rocket Flare's cooldown and multi-shot capability, and Hookshot's stun radius and duration. This upgrade transforms Clockwerk into a relentless teamfight disruptor, countering clustered enemy formations with overwhelming area denial and lockdown potential.
search_text: Clockwerk Aghanim Scepter Overclocking AoE control teamfight disruptor area denial lockdown

display_text: Clockwerk Aghanim's Shard: Jetpack — Grants flying movement, flying vision, and bonus movement speed at the cost of attack capability and turn rate. This upgrade enables Clockwerk to scout and reposition with unparalleled mobility, countering terrain-based defenses and providing critical vision control for high-ground pushes or Roshan contests.
search_text: Clockwerk Aghanim Shard Jetpack flying vision mobility scouting high-ground Roshan
